title: Phase 9: PyO3 Bridge
description: Compile Rust library as Python extension module via PyO3+maturin. All existing Gherkin specs must pass with both pure-Python and Rust backends. Transparent fallback import pattern. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting Phase 9: set up PyO3 bridge + transparent fallback. Next: implement Python import fallback and build wiring. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: implemented PyO3 bridge and transparent fallback import; story closed. Blockers: none.
